generatedResponsibilities: render the claim-to-evidence proof graph as SVG
preserve all verified nodes and edges
preserve trust boundaries and status labels
equivalenceRules: SVG node set must equal the verified visual-model node set.
SVG edge set must equal the verified visual-model edge set.
SVG labels must not introduce meaning absent from the computed report or receipts.
SVG status markers must reflect the computed fidelity posture only.
completionPosture: SVG proof surfaces are governed visual projections and remain subordinate to the verified ASCII trust surface.
